sqlCommand.descr: update TransX set Amt1 = coalesce(Amt1,0), Amt2 = coalesce(Amt2,0), Amt3 = coalesce(Amt3,0) where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '682%'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and substring(CC,4,1) in ('E','I') and not Flex3 = '4'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'  and '[version]' = 'First' and Flex3 = '2'
Update TransX set Flex1 = (case when GL like '6917x%' then '5600062' else '5600000' end) where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%'

Update x set Flex2 = m.UD3 from TransX x inner join osAccountMap3 m on x.GL >= m.GL_From and x.GL <= m.GL_Thru and m.Co_Thru = '9999' and m.TTY = '' and m.BC_From = '' and m.TP_From = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%'
Update TransX set Flex1 = '6820000',Flex2 = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%' and GL = '6820000'
Update TransX set Flex2 = 'U3451' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%' and GL in ('6420000','6420001','6420003')
update TransX set Flex1 = '5620000' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '5600000' and Flex2 in ('U3094','U3091','U3191')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, '5600062' as Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL Like '6917%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, '5600001' as Flex1, 'U3010' as Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL Like '6917%' and Flex1 = '5600000')

Update x set Amt1 = round(Amt1*c.Rate,2), Crcy = 'USD' From TransX x inner join Misc_Tables y on y.Table_ID = 'IR17' and y.ID = 'Crcy Exp' and y.Descr = x.Crcy inner join CrcyRates c on c.Crcy = x.Crcy and c.Typ = 'S' and c.EffDate = '[yyyy-mm-dd]' where x.KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 <> '2'
update TransX set PTF = '', TTY = '', ProdCode = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 <> '2'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]-data2' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Flex1, Flex2, Flex3)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, Flex1 as GL, Crcy, PC, GL as Assgnmt, Flex2 as PTF,Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, GL as Assgnmt, 'U3010' as PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '1')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, '2008' as Co, Flex1 as GL, 'USD' as Crcy, '5500000000' as PC, 'I-' + GL as Assgnmt, Flex2 as PTF,Amt3, Amt3 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '4')
Update x set x.Flex5 = y.Product from TransX x inner join PCtrs y on x.PC = y.PCtr where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set PC = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + 'ANTP0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%'
Update TransX set PC = '5500000000' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%' and Flex5 = 'Investment'
Update TransX set PC ='7URCAANTP0' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Co like '599%'

Update t set Amt2 = round(Amt2*r1.Rate/r2.Rate,2) from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.Field3 = 'convert' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co inner join CrcyRates r1 on r1.Crcy = m.Field2 and r1.Typ = 'S' and r1.EffDate = (select max(EffDate) from (select EffDate from CrcyRates where Typ = 'S' and Crcy = 'GBP' and EffDate <= '[yyyy-mm-dd]') a) inner join CrcyRates r2 on r2.Crcy = m.Field4 and r2.Typ = 'S' and r2.EffDate = r1.EffDate where t.KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, GL + ' U3010' as Assgnmt, 'U3010' as PTF,Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL in ('5600001','5620000') and Flex3 <> '2')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, GL + ' U3010' as Assgnmt, 'U3010' as PTF, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and GL in ('5600001','5620000') and Flex3 <> '2')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3) (Select '[batchID]' as KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, 'prior runs' as Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]-data2' and Flex3 = '2')
Update t set Co = m.Field1 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on m.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m.ID = 'Co' and m.Descr = t.Co where t.KeyID = '[batchID]' and not t.Co like '599%'
update TransX set TTY = '', ProdCode = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3,PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 1' as Assgnmt, '' as PTF, '603' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 1' as Assgnmt, '' as PTF, '610' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 2' as Assgnmt, '' as PTF, '612' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150001' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 2' as Assgnmt, '' as PTF, '824' as TTY, 'U1801' as ProdCode,Amt1, Amt2 , Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt + ' roll 3' as Assgnmt, PTF, '' as TTY, '' as ProdCode, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1, round(-Amt2,2) as Amt2 , round(-Amt3,2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and not Assgnmt = '6917000' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '5600000' as GL, Crcy, PC, '6917000 roll 3' as Assgnmt, 'U3010' as PTF, '' as TTY, '' as ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600062' and not Assgnmt = '6917000' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy, PC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5600000' and Assgnmt like '6917%' and not Assgnmt like '%roll 3'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC, '5600000 roll 4' as Assgnmt, '' as PTF, '602' as TTY, 'U1804' as ProdCode, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600000' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs'  group by KeyID,Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '2150000' as GL, Crcy, PC, '5600000 roll 4' as Assgnmt, '' as PTF, '607' as TTY, 'U1804' as ProdCode,round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and GL = '5600000' and Assgnmt <> 'prior runs' group by KeyID,Co,Crcy,PC)

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, '4398600' as GL, Crcy, '5500000000' as PC, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(-sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(-sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, '0' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' group by KeyID, Co, Crcy)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, 'net' as Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, round(sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, round(sum(Amt2),2) as Amt2 , round(sum(Amt3),2) as Amt3, PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0' and not '[version]' = 'First' group by KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, PK)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Assgnmt <> 'net' and not '[version]' = 'First'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, coalesce(TTY,'') as TTY, coalesce(ProdCode,'') as ProdCode, (case when Amt1 > 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 > 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 > 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '40' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, TTY, ProdCode, Amt1, Amt2, Amt3, PK) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, Crcy, PC, Assgnmt, PTF, coalesce(TTY,'') as TTY, coalesce(ProdCode,'') as ProdCode, (case when Amt1 < 0 then Amt1 else 0 end) as Amt1, (case when Amt2 < 0 then Amt2 else 0 end) as Amt2, (case when Amt3 < 0 then Amt3 else 0 end) as Amt3, '50' as PK from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0')
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and PK = '0'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID like '[batchID]%'
update TransX set Txt = 'IFRS-17 Exp Reclass', SubProd = 'G28' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, PC,PTF,TTY,ProdCode,Amt1) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, PC,PTF,TTY,ProdCode,Amt2) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
insert into TransX (KeyID, Flex3, Co, GL, Crcy, CC, PC,PTF,TTY,ProdCode,Amt3) values ('[batchID]','[pass]',
